name: NOCOPI TECHNOLOGIES INC/MD/
sic_description: Games, Toys & Children's Vehicles (No Dolls & Bicycles)
summary: Nocopi Technologies, Inc. is a Maryland corporation that develops and markets specialty reactive inks for entertainment/toy products and document/brand authentication. Key products include Rub-it & Color technology (color-activation inks for coloring books, games, activity kits) and Copimark and Rub & Reveal systems for anti-counterfeiting and anti-diversion. Revenues come from product sales and licensing/royalty fees to domestic and international licensees and their licensed printers.
